dict.string: Used to open Terminal so you can run `claude /login` when adding an account.
Copyright © 2026 Thanh Ngô. Licensed under MIT.
Claude Bar 11 — menu-bar manager for multiple Claude Code accounts

Settings window redesigned. Sidebar now groups tabs under App, Features, Data & Sync, and System — Accounts, IDE Integration, iCloud Sync, and Diagnostics are first-class tabs instead of being buried inside General or Update. Sidebar search (⌘F). Type to filter tabs by name; Enter picks the first match, Esc clears. Each tab also gets its own tinted icon so the sidebar is scannable at a glance. About panel got a proper hero — app icon, version, channel badge, and a direct "Check for updates…" button without leaving the page. Empty-state hero on the Accounts tab when you haven't enrolled anything yet, so the first-launch path leads with a single big CTA instead of an empty list. Settings remembers the last tab you were viewing between opens.

Fixed the 7-day usage bar flickering on and off for web-linked accounts. The claude.ai scraper now waits for both the 5h and 7d blocks to hydrate before returning, instead of grabbing the first one and dropping the other. Fixed the brief layout shift when opening Settings → Local MCP the first time after launch — the MCP coordinator is now pre-warmed at startup.
